items.definition_en: A small table placed beside a sofa or bed.
items.example_en: She put her coffee cup on the side table.

items.definition_en: A low table usually placed in front of a sofa.
items.example_en: He set the magazine down on the coffee table.

items.definition_en: A small table next to a bed for holding items.
items.example_en: Her alarm clock is always on the nightstand.

items.definition_en: A piece of furniture with several drawers for storing clothes.
items.example_en: I keep my socks in the chest of drawers.

items.definition_en: A chair designed for use at a dining table.
items.example_en: We bought six new dining chairs for the kitchen.

items.definition_en: A comfortable chair that can lean back.
items.example_en: My grandfather always sits in his favorite recliner.

items.definition_en: A low, padded seat without a back, often used as a footrest.
items.example_en: She put her feet up on the ottoman after work.

items.definition_en: A small table with a mirror for applying makeup.
items.example_en: She keeps all her cosmetics on her vanity table.

items.definition_en: A cabinet for displaying and storing dishes and glassware.
items.example_en: Her grandmother keeps fine plates in the china cabinet.

items.definition_en: The upright panel at the end of a bed.
items.example_en: He decorated the wooden headboard with lights.

items.definition_en: The soft pad on which you sleep on a bed frame.
items.example_en: We bought a new mattress for better sleep.

items.definition_en: A stand or wall hooks for hanging coats and hats.
items.example_en: He hung his jacket on the coat rack by the door.

items.definition_en: A shelf or stand for keeping shoes organized.
items.example_en: The hallway is tidier with a shoe rack.

items.definition_en: A table and matching chairs for dining.
items.example_en: They purchased a new dining set for the dining room.

items.definition_en: A piece of furniture for holding a television.
items.example_en: The tv stand also has space for DVDs.

items.definition_en: An ottoman that opens up for storing items inside.
items.example_en: She keeps extra blankets in the storage ottoman.

items.definition_en: A set of beds stacked on top of each other.
items.example_en: The children share a room with a bunk bed.

items.definition_en: A movable screen used to separate spaces in a room.
items.example_en: They added a room divider to make a private area.

items.definition_en: A glass-fronted cabinet for showing items.
items.example_en: Their souvenirs are in a display cabinet in the hall.

items.definition_en: A table with a mirror and drawers for dressing.
items.example_en: She brushes her hair at the dressing table every morning.
